name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work w...
  Expected: I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work w...
assert "I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with.\n\nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you want me to copy\nAny specific formatting or modifications you need\nWhere or how you'd like to use it\n\nI'm here to assist once you share the content!" == "I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with.\nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you want me to copy\nAny specific formatting or modifications you need\nWhere or how you'd like to use it\nI'm here to assist once you share the content!"
  
    I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with.
  + 
    Could you please provide:
    The message or text you want me to copy
    Any specific formatting or modifications you need
    Where or how you'd like to use it
  + 
    I'm here to assist once you share the content!
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:220: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
E   AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
E     Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work w...
E     Expected: I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work w...
E   assert "I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with.\n\nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you want me to copy\nAny specific formatting or modifications you need\nWhere or how you'd like to use it\n\nI'm here to assist once you share the content!" == "I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with.\nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you want me to copy\nAny specific formatting or modifications you need\nWhere or how you'd like to use it\nI'm here to assist once you share the content!"

E       Could you please provide:
